title: lasianthus umbellatus
intro: Lasianthus umbellatus, also known as the white Lasianthus or Chinese Lasianthus, is a plant species in the heath family, Ericaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lasianthus umbellatus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce fever. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
